name: Ezaki Glico Co., Ltd.
summary: Ezaki Glico Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, produces and sells confectionery and other food products in Japan, China, Southeast Asia, and internationally. The company operates through five segments: Confectioneries and Food Products, Ice Cream, Milk and Dairy, Food Ingredients, and Overseas. It provides chocolates, cookies, curry roux, retort-packed food, and other products; milk and other dairy products, fresh confectioneries, and baby formula products; snacks and ice creams; and starch, wheat protein products, food and fine chemicals, food coloring, and other products. The company also offers fruit juices and soft drinks, food material, and health-related products. It sells its products in offices; and through department stores, basement shops, and mail-order services, as well as e-commerce. The company was founded in 1922 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
